title: Debate opening statement
subtitle: Start a debate with clarity.
overview: Open with position, scope, and first reason.
Do not try to say everything at once.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: No se trata de..., sino de...
It is not about..., but about...

items.es: Defiendo la idea de que la educación debería incluir más habilidades prácticas.
items.en: I defend the idea that education should include more practical skills.

items.es: No se trata de eliminar la teoría, sino de conectarla con la vida real.
items.en: It is not about eliminating theory, but connecting it with real life.

items.es: Mi primer argumento es que muchos estudiantes no saben aplicar lo que aprenden.
items.en: My first argument is that many students do not know how to apply what they learn.

items.es: Esto genera frustración y reduce la motivación.
items.en: This creates frustration and reduces motivation.

items.es: Por eso necesitamos un enfoque más equilibrado.
items.en: That is why we need a more balanced approach.
